title: La liga tame Black Cats
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The town's newly promoted...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The town's newly promoted side La liga Football Club defeated the Lawaaikamp, George giants Black Cats 3-1 in a Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League fixture on Saturday 1 February at the Lawaaikamp Stadium.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The town's newly promoted side La liga Football Club defeated the Lawaaikamp, George giants Black Cats 3-1 in a Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League fixture on Saturday 1 February at the Lawaaikamp Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Owothando Wana, Rushane Davids and Ayabulela Mqelhe scored for La liga, while Siphamandla Hlangabeza scored for the Cats.","html":"Owothando Wana, Rushane Davids and Ayabulela Mqelhe scored for La liga, while Siphamandla Hlangabeza scored for the Cats."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Cats are currently in second position in the log with 24 points, and La liga are fighting their way up to the top five.","html":"The Cats are currently in second position in the log with 24 points, and La liga are fighting their way up to the top five."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stellar performance","html":"Stellar performance"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kwanele Sidloyi, a La liga midfielder, delivered a stellar performance against the Cats, playing delightful touches from the centre.","html":"Kwanele Sidloyi, a La liga midfielder, delivered a stellar performance against the Cats, playing delightful touches from the centre."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."}]
